content:
Imagine a friendly robot that loves reading stories and books. This robot is very smart because it has read so many words that it knows how people usually put words together. When you ask it a question or start a sentence, the robot tries to guess what word should come next, one word at a time, just like playing a fun guessing game!

First, the robot remembers all the stories it has read. Then, it looks at the words you gave it and thinks, “What word fits best next?” It picks the word that makes the most sense. Then it guesses the next word after that, and keeps going until the sentence is finished.

Because of this, the robot can help you write stories, answer questions, or chat with you. It’s like having a super helpful, word-smart friend who loves to talk and tell stories!
